/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -I/opt/homebrew/opt/boost/include  -pthread -Wall -funroll-loops -Wno-ignored-attributes -Wno-unused-result -march=armv8-a+simd+crypto+crc -std=c++11 -O3 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/boost/lib CMakeFiles/test_oblisort.dir/oblisort.cpp.o -o ../bin/test_oblisort   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libpqxx/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/libpqxx/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libemp-tool.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.0/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.0/lib/libcrypto.dylib /usr/local/lib/libemp-tool.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.0/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.0/lib/libcrypto.dylib -lpqxx -lpq
